overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail. The weather transitions from bright overcast to stormy darkness as he progresses along the path, eventually passing a peasant traveler near a stream crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail through grassy woodland

events.description: ambient light decreases as storm clouds gather and darken the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking at steady pace along the dirt path with swords on back, moving through open woodland

entered.detail: winding dirt path with patches of grass and small rocks
tall evergreen trees scattered across the landscape
rolling green hills covered in tall grass
dense tree line marking the horizon in the distance
large moss-covered boulders beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open dirt trail through a grassy woodland area. The sky is overcast but relatively bright, with scattered pine trees and rolling hills visible. The lighting begins to dim as storm clouds gather in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail with wooden fencing alongside stream

events.description: wooden split-rail fence appears along right side of path, terrain becomes wetter

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the environment becomes more enclosed, darker, and the trail winds through denser vegetation

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence made of split logs running alongside the path
narrow waterway with grassy banks running parallel to the trail
thick bushes and undergrowth crowding the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as the sky darkens significantly with approaching storm clouds. A wooden split-rail fence appears along the right side, and a stream becomes visible to the left. The vegetation grows denser, creating a more confined atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail crossing over stream with pedestrian encounter

events.description: Geralt passes a peasant traveler walking in the opposite direction on the narrow trail
path crosses wooden planks over the stream, entering denser forest area

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches and passes a traveler, then continues across a small wooden bridge over the stream into darker woods

notable_agents.action: peasant in brown robes walking toward Geralt on the narrow trail, carrying a staff

entered.detail: simple wooden plank bridge crossing over the stream
dense overhead tree cover blocking most of the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: In the darkest section of the trail, Geralt encounters a peasant traveler walking in the opposite direction. The path narrows significantly and crosses a wooden footbridge over the stream. The forest becomes thick and enclosed, with dense canopy overhead blocking the stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transforms from a bright, open woodland into a dark, oppressive stormscape. It begins with Geralt walking through a grassy area under a bright overcast sky, where scattered pine trees and rolling hills are visible. As storm clouds gather and the lighting dims, the trail becomes more enclosed, passing a wooden split-rail fence and a stream that appears to the left. The scene then shifts into a dense, confined forest where the canopy blocks the sky, narrowing the path as it crosses a wooden footbridge. Finally, the camera follows Geralt through this darkest stretch of the woods as he encounters a peasant traveler walking in the opposite direction.
